# Current State

<!-- Framework default template. The ## headings below are the required
     sections the required-sections sensor checks. A team override at
     aidlc/spaces/<space>/memory/templates/current-state.md wins. -->

## The as-is picture

A service blueprint, workflow diagram, or system diagram — whichever fits
the domain — scoped to the problem the intent-statement states.

## How work flows today

The current journey, step by step, as it actually runs — not as the process
documentation says it should — grounded in the materials the
source-inventory lists.

## Users and their goals

Who does the work today, and what each is trying to achieve.

## Constraints and standards

The technical, regulatory, and organizational constraints the as-is picture
operates under, each with its source.

## Confirmed at playback

What the person confirmed or corrected at the playback gate, and when —
including which open-questions-record entries the playback answered or
reopened.
